provenance.notes: Reviewed trust-boundary, local/cloud mode split, account deletion API wiring, keychain-backed cloud device session storage, and evidence honesty. Live hosted worker proof remains out of scope.

requiredFollowUps.description: This review does not satisfy cloud-zalo-session-host live QR/listen/send/restart evidence. That feature must remain passes=false until a real hosted QR flow is scanned and proven with redacted evidence.

summary: Advisor pass for desktop cloud account management. The webview receives hosted QR/account metadata and uses a non-secret keychain sentinel for stored device sessions; live hosted worker proof remains separately open.
